subject: Remove Bootstrapped PM DMaaP objects from MR & DR.
commit_message:
Remove Bootstrapped PM DMaaP objects from MR & DR.

- Remove bootstrapped PM_MAPPER topic
- Remove bootstrapped bulk_pm_feed
- Remove references to PM in default feed

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1517
Change-Id: I1ddb83bc587f8392f22633cd637c9ac735b5042c
Signed-off-by: JoeOLeary <joseph.o.leary@est.tech>

I’m not aware of what else needs to be done to get this accepted.
-Dom

From: Joseph O'Leary [mailto:joseph.o.leary@est.tech] 
Sent: Monday, July 29, 2019 9:05 AM
To: Borislav Glozman <Borislav.Glozman@amdocs.com>; Alexis de Talhouët <adetalhouet89@gmail.com>
Cc: VENKATESH KUMAR, VIJAY <vv770d@att.com>; LUNANUOVA, DOMINIC (DOMINIC) <dgl@research.att.com>
Subject: OOM Pre-merge Procedure

Hi Lads,

I have recently made my first commit to OOM, on both master and staging (as suggested by Vijay). The commit will change the post-install jobs for DMaaP BC, removing some DMaaP objects no longer needed as they're dynamically created.

I have tested the building of the charts locally, everything is building (once I synced the submodules).

I have deployed OOM, DMaaP pods all seem to be deploying (except the mirror maker one, but I've not seen that work yet and suspect that it does not relate to the change I have made.)

Are there any other steps, required prior to merging of these commits (I have had a quick look on the wiki to no avail)?


Thanks
Joe
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman
